text:
Created attachment 224882
gnome-shell-extension-dashtopanel-v42.diff

Hello,

this is an update to v42.

ChangeLog:

This release contains regression fixes for GNOME <= 3.38. GNOME 3.40 will be supported in a future release.

Fixed ungrouped application titles overlapping
Fixes for older GNOME Shell versions


Many thanks in advance.
